extra.reason: Created FunctionsMapping.md with first-pass decompiled function mapping.

Added minimal LogicFriday1.slnx and verified dotnet build

Added *.user to .gitignore and verified the existing .user file is ignored.
Split decompiled C source into one generated file per function.
Implemented File > Close to reset the active editor state and clear transient truth-table columns.

Implemented File > Import Truth Table. Source references: Decompiled/logicfriday_decompiled_functions/004016d2_FUN_004016d2.c command 0x4b3 dispatches import; 004105fb_FUN_004105fb.c opens the file picker with all-files filter; 004110a2_FUN_004110a2.c reads text truth tables; 004116b2_FUN_004116b2.c parses comma/tab-separated truth rows; 00411871_FUN_00411871.c validates variable names/counts; 00411caa_FUN_00411caa.c and 00411dfc_FUN_00411dfc.c expand X inputs and assign outputs/conflict checks; 00410a47_FUN_00410a47.c shows matching export layout. Implemented Avalonia picker, importer parser, dynamic grid creation, output coloring through existing column setup, and retained double-click 0/1/X cycling. Verified with dotnet build LogicFriday1/LogicFriday1.csproj.
Generated understand-anything knowledge graph and validation passed
Enriched graph with FunctionsTracking.csv-sourced function nodes, calls edges, and edge direction fields
Applied FunctionsTracking.csv descriptions to decompiled file nodes and added file/function-level call references
Documented Understand Anything graph locations, dashboard usage, and decompiled reference graph rules in AGENTS.md

Implemented/verified by inspection: MainWindow.axaml defines EquationEditorUndoMenuItem as the first Logic Equation editor context-menu command with Click=EquationEditorUndo_OnClick, and MainWindow.axaml.cs enables it from EquationEditor.CanUndo in EquationEditorContextMenu_OnOpening. The handler focuses EquationEditor and calls EquationEditor.Undo(), matching the original command 0xb3 / EM_UNDO behavior.

Verification attempted: dotnet build LogicFriday1/LogicFriday1.csproj -p:OutDir=..\.temp\verify-build\ -p:UseAppHost=false and the same build with --no-restore both failed before compilation with NU1100 package-source-mapping restore errors for MicroCom.Runtime, HarfBuzzSharp, SkiaSharp, and Tmds.DBus.Protocol; no code compile errors were reached.
Updated NuGet config so nuget.org accepts all package IDs in package source mapping. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Redo is second in the EquationEditor context menu, enabled from EquationEditor.CanRedo, and the click handler focuses EquationEditor then calls EquationEditor.Redo. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Cut is present after the Undo Redo separator, enabled only when the equation editor has a selection, and its click handler focuses EquationEditor then calls Cut. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Copy is present after Cut, enabled only when the equation editor has a selection, and its click handler focuses EquationEditor then calls Copy. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented Paste context menu enabled state: Paste is named in XAML, enabled from clipboard text availability when the context menu opens, and its click handler focuses EquationEditor then calls Paste. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Delete is present after Paste, enabled only when the equation editor has a selection, and its click handler focuses EquationEditor then clears SelectedText. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Select All is present after Delete, enabled when the equation editor has text, and its click handler focuses EquationEditor then calls SelectAll. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Cancel is present after Submit and its click handler routes to MainWindowViewModel.CancelLogicEquationEditing, the shared equation editor cancel path. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented by existing MainWindow context menu wiring: Submit is present before Cancel and its click handler routes to MainWindowViewModel.SubmitLogicEquationEditing, the shared equation editor submit path. Full equation parsing remains tracked by LogicFriday1-c2n.12. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.
Implemented Equation menu Submit and Enter key routing plus equation parsing and evaluation into LogicEquationFunction. Verification build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.
Added Espresso as a git submodule and referenced the README-recommended EspressoII C# project from LogicFriday1 and the solution. Verification build succeeded with no package-source-mapping errors.

Implemented toolbar routing to existing equation editor edit commands with toolbar enabled state refreshed from editor selection, clipboard, undo, and redo state. Verification solution build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented toolbar routing to existing equation editor edit commands with toolbar enabled state refreshed from editor selection, clipboard, undo, and redo state. Verification solution build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented toolbar routing to existing equation editor edit commands with toolbar enabled state refreshed from editor selection, clipboard, undo, and redo state. Verification solution build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented toolbar routing to existing equation editor edit commands with toolbar enabled state refreshed from editor selection, clipboard, undo, and redo state. Verification solution build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Implemented toolbar routing to existing equation editor edit commands with toolbar enabled state refreshed from editor selection, clipboard, undo, and redo state. Verification solution build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.
Added explicit disabled toolbar button and icon styles so disabled buttons render with lower opacity and muted foreground. Verification solution build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors.

Extracted lf.chm with 7z into .temp/lf-chm-extracted after hh.exe produced empty output, converted 30 HTML topics plus TOC to Markdown in .temp/lf-help-md with Pandoc, copied 3 extracted images, and normalized internal .htm links to .md.
Moved converted help into D:\LogicFriday1.wiki and committed it there, then removed the tracked wiki/ folder from this repository.

Converted remaining internal wiki links to GitHub wiki link syntax, renamed CHM-style files to page-title filenames with spaces so [[Page title]] links resolve, and committed D:\LogicFriday1.wiki at e9951df.
Deleted toc.md from D:\LogicFriday1.wiki and committed the wiki repository at c869818.

Implemented gate diagram sidebar Help button to open https://github.com/MovGP0/LogicFriday1/wiki/Entering-a-gate-diagram in the system default browser via shell execute. Verification solution build succeeded; only upstream EspressoII CA2014 warning appeared.

Implemented 2-In NAND gate diagram placement: selecting the palette item and clicking the diagram surface adds a snapped two-input NAND symbol and redraws the surface. Verification solution build succeeded; only upstream EspressoII CA2014 warning appeared.
